name: DORA
description: EU regulation establishing harmonized ICT risk management, incident reporting, resilience testing, and third-party risk controls for financial entities.

categories.name: ICT Governance and Risk Management
categories.description: Establish governance and ICT risk management controls.

requirements.name: Establish ICT risk management framework
requirements.description: Establish ICT risk management framework with auditable evidence and governance artifacts.
requirements.verification: Review policies and execution records for establish ict risk management framework

applicability.subject: Financial entities and critical ICT third-party providers

requirements.name: Management body accountable for ICT risk
requirements.description: Management body accountable for ICT risk with auditable evidence and governance artifacts.
requirements.verification: Review policies and execution records for management body accountable for ict risk

applicability.subject: Financial entities and critical ICT third-party providers

subcategories.name: Risk Process
subcategories.description: Implement risk assessment and control process.

requirements.verification: Review policies and execution records for implement identification and protection controls

applicability.subject: Financial entities and critical ICT third-party providers

requirements.verification: Review policies and execution records for threat-led penetration testing where applicable
